prompt: A transport layer can decode its own compressed payloads, but standard clients reject bodies labeled as gzip and standard gzip bodies fail on receipt. Diagnose the encoder/decoder interoperability contract while keeping the current APIs. Public internal round trips pass. Edit at most two candidate source files.

repo_files.transport/headers.py:
def normalize_encoding(value):
    return value.strip().lower() if value else "identity"
repo_files.tests/test_public.py:
from transport.decoder import decode_body
from transport.encoder import encode_body
from transport.headers import normalize_encoding


def test_internal_compressed_round_trip():
    body = b"invoice=17&status=ready"
    assert decode_body(encode_body(body)) == body


def test_encoding_header_normalization():
    assert normalize_encoding(" GZip ") == "gzip"
    assert normalize_encoding(None) == "identity"
